changes: Foundry run-link readiness summaries now expose return_gate_status, continuation_contract_reason, exact_next_action, and refuses_final_response.
Execution validator rejects stale Foundry readiness continuation reason, exact next action, and refusal fields.
Production readiness asserts generated Foundry readiness summaries carry the continuation fields.
The v0.3 execution ledger fixture source artifact digest was updated for the expanded Foundry readiness summary.
